news.t: Hedgeye Capital Allocation ETF (HECA) and Hedgeye Quality Growth ETF (HGRO) Now Available Through LPL Financial
Hedgeye Asset Management Launches the Hedgeye Quality Growth ETF (HGRO) Managed by Veteran PM Sam Rahman

holdings.infoBox: HGRO is an equity ETF with a total of 57 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 8.88%, Alphabet at 8.24%, NVIDIA at 8.06%, First American Government Obligations Fund Class X at 5.88%, and Amazon.com at 3.47%.

overview.description: The Hedgeye Quality Growth ETF (HGRO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund invests in US-listed large- and mid-cap growth stocks. The actively managed ETF employs a framework that identifies macroeconomic themes that measures and maps growth and inflation data, selecting companies based on fundamentals. HGRO was launched on Jun 10, 2025 and is issued by Hedgeye.
